rationale: Article VIII, §14 governs election and duties of county tax assessor-collectors. It is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: An assessor-collector of taxes shall hold office for four years; and shall perform all the duties with respect to assessing property for the purpose of taxation and of collecting taxes, as may be prescribed by the Legislature.
_note: This constitutional provision concerns tax assessor-collector offices, not homestead exemption levels. The relevant constitutional authority for homestead exemptions is Tex. Const. art. VIII, §1-b.
